title: BoilerSupervisorCoordination v1
description: Read-only package coordination overview over frozen child execution lanes and package-level proxy operations.

package_definition.title: Boiler Supervisor Coordination v1
boundary_notes: Package coordination is authoring-level orchestration only.
BoilerSupervisorCoordination v1 is supervisory only and does not imply burner safety.

members.title: Pump Group
members.boundary_note: Circulation remains a child execution lane; package only coordinates and proxies it.

members.title: PID Controller
members.boundary_note: PID autotune remains the existing Wave 9 child execution path behind the package proxy.

aggregate_monitors.title: Coordination Health
aggregate_monitors.summary: Child surfaces are aligned and package coordination is active.

operation_proxies.title: Start Supervision
operation_proxies.summary: Package start proxy completed through the child pump group lane.

operation_proxies.title: Acknowledge Faults
operation_proxies.summary: Blocked until an active fault is latched.

operation_proxies.title: Reset Package Counters
operation_proxies.summary: Reset proxy is currently using the frozen child reset lane.

operation_proxies.title: PID Autotune Proxy
operation_proxies.summary: Delegates to the existing Wave 9 PID autotune child path.
